title: satureja reptans
intro: Satureja reptans, also known as savory or winter savory, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region characterized by its small, grayish-green leaves and purple flowers. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Satureja reptans include relief from digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of Satureja reptans include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or mixing them with a carrier oil.
